name: Professional
description: Clean, neutral professional style. Suitable for LinkedIn and corporate job boards. Formal tone, no emoji, structured layout.
voice: Third-person or neutral first-person. Professional, clear, and concise.
writingPrinciples: Open with the job title and company name
State the key details factually: location, salary, employment type
Include a brief one-sentence summary of the role
Close with the application link and a single clear call-to-action
Avoid informal language, slang, or casual phrasing
ctaApproach: One direct CTA. Typically: 'Apply via the link below' or 'Follow for more opportunities.'
formattingRules: Application link on its own line
Use bullet points sparingly if listing multiple details
